ITEM.name: Rusty Dagger
ITEM.desc: It has some rust here and there. Once used, it's sure to be difficult to sell.

ITEM.name: Iron Dagger
ITEM.desc: Basic iron dagger, made in a factory. A serial number is barely visible on the surface.

ITEM.name: Military Dagger
ITEM.desc: Military assault dagger.

ITEM.name: Lightweight Dagger
ITEM.desc: Easy to use lightweight dagger.

ITEM.name: High-Class Dagger
ITEM.desc: Heavy unique high-class dagger. Beautiful pattern inscribed on the surface.

ITEM.name: Phantom Slaying Dagger
ITEM.desc: Mysterious dagger, used to kill evil spirits. However, it could be an urban legend.

ITEM.name: Warlord's Gut Ripper
ITEM.desc: Unique dagger, used by Warlord's during the Storm civil war.

ITEM.name: Crystal Blade
ITEM.desc: A dagger which uses its easy breakable disadvantage property to its advantage. The light crystal blade leaves its broken pieces in the opponent's body when attack and creates fatal wounds.

ITEM.name: Steel Dagger
ITEM.desc: A dagger made of steel. Its blade is more durable compare to the regular daggers.

ITEM.name: Hunter Dagger
ITEM.desc: An official dagger for Hunter’s Association. It has better quality than regular daggers sold at the market.

ITEM.name: Black Iron Dagger
ITEM.desc: A dagger made of expensive black iron. It is worth the price.

ITEM.name: Alloy Dagger
ITEM.desc: A very lightweight dagger made of special alloy. Its price is not lightweight at all.

ITEM.name: Rusty Sword
ITEM.desc: It's a rusty sword. Once used, it's sure to be difficult to sell.

ITEM.name: Iron Sword
ITEM.desc: Low level iron sword. Faint serial number visible on the surface.

ITEM.name: Military Sword
ITEM.desc: Great looking sword, used by ranked officers.

ITEM.name: Lightweight Sword
ITEM.desc: Easy to use lightweight sword.

ITEM.name: High-class Sword
ITEM.desc: High-Class sword, made of rare materials for combat.

ITEM.name: Devil Slayer
ITEM.desc: Mysterious sword used to kill a haunted evil spirit.

ITEM.name: Golden Dragon Sword
ITEM.desc: Gold plated attractive sword. Sword collectors desperately want to acquire this powerful katana.

ITEM.name: Shura
ITEM.desc: A sword used by Gumho, who was a legendary warrior at the battle field long time ago. After his death, his nick name became the name of the weapon.

ITEM.name: Steel Sword
ITEM.desc: A sword made of steel. Its blade is more durable compare to regular swords.

ITEM.name: Hunter Sword
ITEM.desc: An official sword for Hunter’s Association. It has better quality than regular swords sold at the market.

ITEM.name: Black Iron Sword
ITEM.desc: A sword made of expensive black iron. It is worth the price.

ITEM.name: Alloy Sword
ITEM.desc: A very lightweight sword made of special alloy. Its price is not lightweight at all.

ITEM.name: Iron Kodachi
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These Kodachi Iron swords are widely produced for the general public.

ITEM.name: Lightweight Kodachi
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Kodachi swords designed for two hands. Much lighter and smaller than regular swords.

ITEM.name: High-Class Kodachi
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) This unique sword produced by Kodachi is made of high-end rare materials.

ITEM.name: Red Blood
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These powerful swords are a symbol of the Red Blood Dynasty, carried by a great swordsman in ancient times.

ITEM.name: Dual Scimitar
ITEM.desc: A dual sword used by nomads who live in the distant desert far from Axium (tax included)

ITEM.name: Outdated Kodachi
ITEM.desc: Old kodachi. There are some rusts over the weapon. It won’t be easy to sell it back after the use.

ITEM.name: Military Kodachi
ITEM.desc: Kodachi used in military. Special army uses this weapon.

ITEM.name: Black Iron Kodachi
ITEM.desc: Kodachi made of expensive black iron. It is worth the price.

ITEM.name: Alloy Kodachi
ITEM.desc: Very lightweight kodachi made of special alloy. Its price is not lightweight at all.

ITEM.name: Giant Sword
ITEM.desc: Sword used by the Hiru tribe.

ITEM.name: Raptor 50
ITEM.desc: This pistol has been used since a long time ago in the empire. Its production has been discontinued. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raptor 50 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These pistols have been used since a long time ago in the empire. Their production has been discontinued. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raptor 80
ITEM.desc: A revised model of the Raptor 50. Its performance slightly improved but the appearance has not changed from the old version. Its production was announced to be stopped quite early as its competition released a new product. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raptor 80 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Revised models of the Raptor 50. The performance improved slightly but the appearance has not changed from the old version. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raven 5
ITEM.desc: This pistol was produced to be supplied to the battlefront of the Republic. Manufactured by Maxwell.

ITEM.name: Raven 5 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These pistols were produced to be supplied to the battle front of the Republic. Manufactured by Maxwell.

ITEM.name: Raptor 120
ITEM.desc: It was developed to be supplied to the military. Its accuracy has been improved from the Raptor 80. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raptor 120 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) It was developed to be supplied to the military. Its accuracy has been improved from the Raptor 80s. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raven 6
ITEM.desc: The follow-up model of the Raven 5. It's performance has been improved but its manufacturer failed to make it lighter. Manufactured by Maxwell.

ITEM.name: Raven 6 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) The follow-up models of the Raven 5. The performance has been improved but its manufacturer failed to make it lighter. Manufactured by Maxwell.

ITEM.name: Raptor 160
ITEM.desc: The follow-up model to the Raptor 120. It has more firepower, better performance and an excellent rate of fire.

ITEM.name: Raptor 160 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) The follow-up model to the Raptor 120. They have more firepower, better performance and an excellent rate of fire.

ITEM.name: Raven 7
ITEM.desc: The Raven 7 has more firepower and a better rate of fire but it still has some drawbacks in terms of accuracy and weight.

ITEM.name: Raven 7 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) The Raven 7s have more firepower and a better rate of fire but they still have some drawbacks in terms of accuracy and weight.

ITEM.name: Raptor 200
ITEM.desc: The Raptor series won confidence with it's high rate of fire and accuracy. This weapon shows the advanced development capability of Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raptor 200 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) The Raptor series won confidence with it's high rate of fire and accuracy. These weapons show the advanced development capability of Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raven 8
ITEM.desc: Model developed mainly to improve fire power and higher rate of fire and laid aside the weight improvement which has been the chronic problem of problem of Raven series.

ITEM.name: Raven 8 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Model developed mainly to improve fire power and higher rate of fire and laid aside the weight improvement which has been the chronic problem of problem of Raven series.

ITEM.name: Iris Pistol Limited x2
ITEM.desc: Limited edition of Iris pistol with unique color used by Republican soldiers which is no longer in production and became a valued premium among the collectors.

ITEM.name: Minic 567
ITEM.desc: This legendary revolver was produced by Maxwell and supplied to the general infantry of the Republic. Its production is now discontinued.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These legendary revolvers were produced by Maxwell and supplied to the general infantry of the Republic. Its production is now discontinued.

ITEM.name: Dynax 7000
ITEM.desc: The first of the lightweight revolvers from Canox. Though it's production has been discontinued, the second-hand Dynax is still a popular gun.

ITEM.name: Dynax 7000 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) The first of the lightweight revolvers from Canox. Though their production has been discontinued, the second-hand Dynax is still a popular gun.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 Limited
ITEM.desc: This model was produced in order to commemorate the fifth anniversary of Maxwell's Minic. It is more powerful than the original.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 Limited x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These were produced in order to commemorate the fifth aniversary of Maxwell's Minic. They have more firepower that the originals.

ITEM.name: Zaurus A
ITEM.desc: This revolver was developed to supply the military. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Zaurus A x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These revolvers were developed to supply the military. Manufactured by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise
ITEM.desc: High-end revolver made by Nico. Its upgraded design draws a lot of attention.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) High-end revolvers made by Nico. Its upgraded design draws a lot of attention.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise N
ITEM.desc: Phantom Cruise's slightly upgraded model. Its performance has slightly improved.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise N x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Phantom Cruise's minor upgraded models. The performance has slightly improved.

ITEM.name: Dynax 8000
ITEM.desc: Lightweight revolver made by Canox. This is the follow-up model of the Dynax 7000, its performance has remarkably improved.

ITEM.name: Dynax 8000 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Lightweight revolvers made by Canox. These are the follow-up models of the Dynax 7000, their performance have remarkably improved.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 MK.II
ITEM.desc: This is an upgraded model of the commemorative fifth anniversary Minic 567. It packs more power than the original one.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 MK.II x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) This is the upgraded models of the commemorative fifth anniversary Minic 567. They pack more power than the original ones.

ITEM.name: Zaurus B
ITEM.desc: The Zaurus Type B is the most powerful handgun money can buy. It also has better accuracy.

ITEM.name: Zaurus B x2
ITEM.desc: (Duel Wield) The Zaurus Type Bs are the most powerful handgun money can buy. They also have better accuracy.

ITEM.name: Dynax 800C
ITEM.desc: Illegally altered model of 8000 which once was very popular. This model gained popularity so the Canox company decided to sell it officially.

ITEM.name: Dynax 800C x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Illegally altered model of 8000 which once was very popular. This model gained popularity so the Canox company decided to sell it officially.

ITEM.name: Renard
ITEM.desc: This old submachine gun was produced by Canox. Its production has been discontinued.

ITEM.name: Renard x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These old submachine guns were produced by Canox. Its production has been discontinued.

ITEM.name: Walcom S5
ITEM.desc: This submachine gun produced by Walcom are quite popular. They have better firepower and a larger ammo capacity.

ITEM.name: Walcom S5 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These submachine guns produced by Walcom are quite popular. They have better firepower and a larger ammo capacity.

ITEM.name: Ellan
ITEM.desc: Canox's small submachine gun. This was manufactured with a focus on better mobility.

ITEM.name: Ellan x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Canox's small submachine guns. These were manufactured with focus on better mobility.

ITEM.name: Renard V
ITEM.desc: Follow-up model of the once widely-popular Renard. It has better accuracy and a higher rate of fire.

ITEM.name: Renard V x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Follow-up model of the once widely popular Renards. They have better accuracy and a higher rate of fire.

ITEM.name: Walcom S6
ITEM.desc: The follow-up model of the Walcom S5. It has more firepower and better stability compared with its previous model.

ITEM.name: Walcom S6 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) The follow-up models of Walcom's S5. They have more firepower and better stability compared with its previous models.

ITEM.name: New Renard V
ITEM.desc: New version of the popular Renard V produced by Canox.

ITEM.name: New Renard V x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) New versions of the popular Renard V produced by Canox.

ITEM.name: Walcom XL
ITEM.desc: This model was produced in order to commemorate the 70th anniversary of Walcom. It has a lightweight body and it is called 'the Exterminator'.

ITEM.name: Walcom XL x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These models were produced in order to commemorate the 70th anniversary of Walcom. It has a lightweight body and it is called 'the Exterminator'.

ITEM.name: Renard VI
ITEM.desc: This new model was produced by Canox whose popularity was dented by Walcom XL.

ITEM.name: Renard VI x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These new models were produced by Canox whose popularity was dented by Walcom XL.

ITEM.name: Walcom XLS
ITEM.desc: Upgrade to the Walcom XL. The only difference from the old model is enhanced fire power.

ITEM.name: Walcom XLS x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Upgrades to the Walcom XL. The only difference from the old models are enhanced fire power.

ITEM.name: Walcom S7
ITEM.desc: New SMG from Walcom company which has been rivary of Renard company. The fire power has been enhanced.

ITEM.name: Walcom S7 x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) New SMG from Walcom company which has been rivary of Renard company. The fire power has been enhanced.

ITEM.name: Breaker 3
ITEM.desc: Pump action shotgun produced by Leonics, who has specialized in the production of shotguns for ages. Its production has been discontinued.

ITEM.name: Breaker 5
ITEM.desc: Pump action type shotgun produced by Leonics. Though made a long time ago, it is still very popular.

ITEM.name: Breaker 6
ITEM.desc: Leonics' new shotgun that was released quite recently.

ITEM.name: Breaker 7
ITEM.desc: Leonics's 7th model adopted a new design different from the existing Breaker series.

ITEM.name: Avenger
ITEM.desc: Shotgun introduced by Nico as a monumental product. This weapon has strong destructive power. It's only drawback, is it can only load a small number of bullets.

ITEM.name: Breaker 8
ITEM.desc: New shotgun produced by Leonics, who is quite famous for the Breaker series of shotguns.

ITEM.name: Avenger MK.II
ITEM.desc: Avenger's follow-up model that became the weapon of choice for adventurers.

ITEM.name: Breaker 9P
ITEM.desc: Prototype model of the Breaker9, the newest shotgun of Rionix. Great ability but a bit unstable.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Shotgun Limited
ITEM.desc: Limited edition of Iron Crow shotgun with unique color which is no longer in production and became a valued premium among the collectors.

ITEM.name: Cruelizon Limited
ITEM.desc: Limited edition of Cruelizon with unique color which is no longer in production and became a valued premium among the collectors.

ITEM.name: Nico R2
ITEM.desc: Rifle produced by Nico in the early days.

ITEM.name: Nico R5
ITEM.desc: One of the most popular rifles among the Republican army.

ITEM.name: Walcom Warrior 77
ITEM.desc: Produced by Walcom, it has the drawback of being difficult to use but it has relatively strong power.

ITEM.name: Maxwell LX30
ITEM.desc: Produced by Maxwell, this weapon has stable grip, good operability, and a high rate of fire.

ITEM.name: Nico R6
ITEM.desc: Follow-up model of popular R5 of Nico. With its improved fire power, it is popular among R5 maniacs.

ITEM.name: Maxwell LX44
ITEM.desc: (Discontinued Item) Rifle with a higher fire rate than LX30. It has a stable grip with high accuracy.

ITEM.name: Nico R7
ITEM.desc: Nico's new rifle with better fire power.

ITEM.name: Walcom Warrior 88
ITEM.desc: Still not easy to use but, this new product by Walcom is produced to focus on stronger fire power.

ITEM.name: Maxwell SWT
ITEM.desc: New rifle developed by Maxwell company which has been requested by Special force in charge of Metropolise security. It has greatly improved on weight and bullet carriage.

ITEM.name: Nico MG-K8
ITEM.desc: It is so heavy that it is hard to carry but, its rate of fire makes the enemies shiver in fear.

ITEM.name: Nico MG-K9
ITEM.desc: K9 machine gun with upgraded power. It's powerful rate of fire and damage will make swiss cheese of the opposition.

ITEM.name: Nico MG-KX
ITEM.desc: Nico's new machine gun with explosive power. Even just looking at the MG-KX will make the enemies feel pain.

ITEM.name: Nico MG-K11
ITEM.desc: With the popularity of KX, this previously developed machine gun model has been released with the name K11.

ITEM.name: Walcom L1
ITEM.desc: Rocket launcher with strong fire power produced by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Maxwell RW-77
ITEM.desc: Rocket launcher produced by Maxwell. It can hold more bullets than Walcom's L series and has a better fire rate capability. However, the fire power was reduced.

ITEM.name: Walcom L1 mk. II
ITEM.desc: Walcom's Rocket Launcher. This slightly upgraded model of the L1 has slightly stronger fire power.

ITEM.name: Maxwell RW-88
ITEM.desc: An upgraded version of RW-77. Though nothing major has changed, it has a better rate of fire than the previous models.

ITEM.name: Walcom L2
ITEM.desc: Walcom's Rocket Launcher. Holds more bullets than L1, it has become a little lighter and more powerful.

ITEM.name: Maxwell RW-66
ITEM.desc: Rocket launcher made in the early days by Maxwell. It lacks the strong power.

ITEM.name: Maxwell RW-99
ITEM.desc: A revolutionary rocket that has increased the maximum number of bullet and reduced the weight by using new material.

ITEM.name: Bird's Sniper Rifle SN40
ITEM.desc: Used by the military during the storm civil war. This is a typical sniper rifle with optimal level of accuracy.

ITEM.name: Ring of the Citizen
ITEM.desc: This ring was designed by the mayor in commemoration of his city and citizens.

ITEM.name: Ring of the Crying Hawk
ITEM.desc: This legendary ring was used by the special combat forces in ancient times.

ITEM.name: Warrior's Cry
ITEM.desc: This small ring preserves the wishes of many warriors who longed for a safe return home alive.

ITEM.name: Pierre's Ring
ITEM.desc: This ring holds the spirit of a brave commander who was killed in battle.

ITEM.name: FMT Ring
ITEM.desc: This unique ring was designed to commemorate the scientist who created a system named FMT. There is a faint McField signature inscribed inside of the band.

ITEM.name: Ring of Good Fortune
ITEM.desc: Simple designed ring for good fortune.

ITEM.name: Altema's Ring
ITEM.desc: This ring was designed by the TEAMI in commemoration of Altema's war achievements.

ITEM.name: Band of the Blood
ITEM.desc: A beautiful red jewel is the center piece for this energy based ring.

ITEM.name: Elia's Ring
ITEM.desc: Elia's troops heroically protected Menlo, during the battle of Sun and raised the overall morale of Emperor Altema's soldiers. This ring was created to commemorate the princess' call of immortal courage.

ITEM.name: Ring of a Feather
ITEM.desc: This legendary ring enhances forces that help defy gravity.

ITEM.name: Vitality Ring
ITEM.desc: Commemoration ring that has rumor that it will alleviate the wearer’s fatigue, and the rumor seems to be true!

ITEM.name: Guardian Ring
ITEM.desc: Talisman ring worn by the Mercenaries. It definitely has some mystical powers!

ITEM.name: Affluence Ring
ITEM.desc: Commemoration ring to honor the great harvest year. The ring would make your body feel light and also make you feel that everything will work out well.

ITEM.name: Hunter's Ring
ITEM.desc: A commemoration ring awarded to only the finest hunters. It proves that the holder of the ring is a hunter with outstanding skills.

ITEM.name: Winter Warrior (Men)
ITEM.desc: Avatar of the Winter Warriors, mystical creatures that hunt monsters in the Polar Regions of Northernmost Astra. Their reason for hunting is unknown and kept secret by the Warriors themselves.

ITEM.name: Winter Warrior (Women)
ITEM.desc: Avatar of the Winter Warriors, mystical creatures that hunt monsters in the Polar Regions of Northernmost Astra. Their reason for hunting is unknown and kept secret by the Warriors themselves.

ITEM.name: Skeleton Sword
ITEM.desc: Precious sword used by the Skeleton soldiers.

ITEM.name: GM 머신건
ITEM.desc: GM 머신건

ITEM.name: GM Coat (Women)
ITEM.desc: GM exclusive Coat

ITEM.name: GM Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: GM exclusive Coat

ITEM.name: Ring of Apology
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) This unique heavy ring enhances defensive strength during battle.

ITEM.name: Bug Buster Trench Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Men's trench coat that only those adventurers who helped rid the abnormal noxious creatures away from the world of Astra, can wear it.

ITEM.name: Bug Buster Trench Coat (Women)
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Women's trench coat that only those adventurers who helped rid the abnormal noxious creatures away from the world of Astra, can wear it.

ITEM.name: Main Event Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Jackets for the crowd control staff members.

ITEM.name: Main Event Jacket (Women)
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Jackets for the crowd control staff members.

ITEM.name: Decipher's Ring
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Precious golden ring with ancient symbols inscribed on its surface.

ITEM.name: Triangle Seaweed-Rolled Rice
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Triangle shaped rice rolls wrapped in seaweed. It can help you recover health and armor in combat.

ITEM.name: Pampoa Companion Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Mysterious legendary armor produced by King Roku for the Pampoa tribe. This coat enhances health and armor during battle.

ITEM.name: Pampoa Companion Coat (Women)
ITEM.desc: Mysterious legendary armor produced by King Roku for the Pampoa's tribe. This coat enhances health and armor during battle.

ITEM.name: Candy Bar
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Sweet Candy.

ITEM.name: Burning Tide Helmet (Men)
ITEM.desc: Designed by Vinz. The flames give it an intense look.

ITEM.name: Burning Tide Helmet (Women)
ITEM.desc: Designed by Vinz. The fierce but passionate look is so impressive.

ITEM.name: Turkey Dinner
ITEM.desc: Special item for Thanksgiving that has healing powers.

ITEM.name: Icecream
ITEM.desc: Natural Icecream for hot summer nights. It's good for health and has good taste, so let's have it as much as possible.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Dagger
ITEM.desc: Practical lightweight dagger.

ITEM.name: Koden Knife
ITEM.desc: A dagger designed by a legendary swordsman.

ITEM.name: Dark-Sun Martial Dagger
ITEM.desc: An obscure dagger handed down from the Moon dynasty.

ITEM.name: Ridic Hunter Dagger
ITEM.desc: This strange dagger raises defensive strength.

ITEM.name: Cakram
ITEM.desc: An unsually shaped ring sword that only the first class swordsmen of the ancient kingdom could handle. The sound of it piercing the wind makes their own army tremble with fear.

ITEM.name: Shadow Vane
ITEM.desc: A dagger so sharp that those who wield it believe it can cut through shadows. The dagger's weight is nearly finite, the lightest of its kind.

ITEM.name: Inferno
ITEM.desc: A rare dagger that generates its own heat. Due to its unique ability, it is very popular in the colder regions. The dagger as a weapon is not very strong, but it is known for its shamanistic powers.

ITEM.name: Ritual Dagger
ITEM.desc: A golden ceremonial dagger. This dagger is not much of a weapon, but it has a mysterious effect.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Long Sword
ITEM.desc: Adventurer's Lightweight practical sword.

ITEM.name: Salamanda
ITEM.desc: A unique sword designed by a legendary swordsman.

ITEM.name: Dark Karma
ITEM.desc: An obscure sword handed down from the Moon dynasty.

ITEM.name: Wooden Sword
ITEM.desc: A light wooden sword suitable for beginners practicing swordsmanship.

ITEM.name: Mace
ITEM.desc: A gruesome looking iron hammer. It is powerful, but slow, heavy and hard to handle.

ITEM.name: Sacrifice
ITEM.desc: A sword that assumedly used for ancient traditional ceremonies. The blade is not made of iron but some mystery metal and despite for its old age, the blade hasn't lost its sharpness.

ITEM.name: Golden Dragon Dual Sword
ITEM.desc: Golden Dragon Dual Sword, used by the highest officers, designed to intimidate enemies of the Empire. (Designed by Bak4Maru from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Thunder Bird
ITEM.desc: A sword made of mystical black iron only found at the mountain areas of southern mainland. The unique refinery technique of black iron made the thunder bird shape on the sword. (Designed by jin_sd from KR GunZ)

ITEM.name: PlungerX
ITEM.desc: Ultimate weapon that can flush anything. It strikes both mind and body.

ITEM.name: PlungerX
ITEM.desc: Ultimate weapon that can flush anything. It strikes both mind and body.

ITEM.name: ROCK
ITEM.desc: The sword that has the soul of a legendary guitarist of Astra. The sound from the hilt drives people wild and even a slight touch of the blade can be deadly. (Designed by ROOT from JAPAN GunZ)

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Sword
ITEM.desc: An odd shaped katana made from the bones of the black dragon. The Black Dragon Sword is difficult to manage and requires much strength to control, maybe due to the dragon’s grudge; however, once controlled its power is astonishing.

ITEM.name: Chain Sword
ITEM.desc: A powerful and epic saw-blade sword that reigns destruction upon anyone in its path. Its only defect is its heavy weight.

ITEM.name: Justice
ITEM.desc: A Knight's Sword of the Axium Empire made with an extremely light alloy. This sword represents justice, tradition, and with its sturdy guard handle allows for defensive agility.

ITEM.name: Silver Fang
ITEM.desc: A great sword made by the royal craftsmen of the Empire. The sword is custom made only for Knights of the Empire, making the sword extremely rare.

ITEM.name: Harvester
ITEM.desc: An ultralight ax that can be lightly handled liked a sword. It has been praised for satisfying both power and usability.

ITEM.name: Slicer
ITEM.desc: This high-end katana from Adam Industry was modeled after the teeth of the ancient Megalodon shark. New forging techniques have even made it light enough to be shot from a bow like an arrow.

ITEM.name: Bonewrecker
ITEM.desc: A special bladed weapon designed to crush human bones.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These pistols are mainly used by novice adventurers.

ITEM.name: Ridic Hunter Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These strange pistols raise AP for the person who wears it.

ITEM.name: Iris Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) These are pistols that the Republic's soldiers used to use. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Pistols used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani.

ITEM.name: Requiem
ITEM.desc: This reconstructed gun has the same rapid-fire speed of a pistol as well as the strong firepower of a revolver. Its big size and recoil make it hard to control, but its firepower is indisputable.

ITEM.name: Judgment
ITEM.desc: The Axium Empire knights' pistol. This weapon was widely regarded as a symbol of justice. The spread wings that grace the barrel are said to protect the shooter while shooting.

ITEM.name: TIS Pistols
ITEM.desc: The future of dual-pistol technology is upon us. The Time Induced Shot (TIS) pistol appeared from the underworld through unknown sources.

ITEM.name: Iris Revolver x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Revolvers that the Republic's soldiers used to use. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Revolver x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Revolvers used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani.

ITEM.name: Gold Hound x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) The most powerful revolvers of their class. Developed mainly focusing on firepower. It is difficult for beginners to use it due to it's slow firing rate and strong recoil.

ITEM.name: Peacemaker x2
ITEM.desc: A pair of revolver which use Magnum bullets to enhance the fire power. In order to reduce the recoil and increase the continuous shooting power, the size of the gun is augmented to raise the weight.

ITEM.name: Golden Olympus
ITEM.desc: A powerful pistol created by a famous gunsmith from the Midwest part of Astra. (Designed by Müller Pereira from Brazil GunZ)

ITEM.name: Bow Gun
ITEM.desc: A weapon that shoots arrows using the catapult. It is remodeled to improve the revolver's control ability.

ITEM.name: Adventurer SMG x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) SMGs mainly used by novice adventurers. It seems that merchants remodel the Renard's Magazine illegally and then sell them on the black market.

ITEM.name: Iris SMG x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) SMGs that the Republic's soldiers used to use.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow SMG x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) SMGs used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani.

ITEM.name: Nail Gun SMG x2
ITEM.desc: An industrial tool reformed for military use. It has strong damage but slow consecutive shot speed.

ITEM.name: Punisher x2
ITEM.desc: Latest SMG developed by Adam Industry. The gun’s muzzle is split to implement overwhelming fire power. Due to insufficient supply, this weapon is currently extremely rare.

ITEM.name: Iris Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Shotgun that the Republic's soldiers used to use. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Shotgun used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani.

ITEM.name: Biggie Shotgun
ITEM.desc: A unknown foreign country developed this shotgun. It looks a little too light as a weapon, but the gun has great capability which comes from its light weight.

ITEM.name: Cruelizon
ITEM.desc: A shotgun with enhanced power from the Breaker series. Fire rate and stability are relatively decreased, thus making it hard to control this gun.

ITEM.name: Pioneer
ITEM.desc: The gun's inner structure is remarkably altered for faster continuous shooting and high bullet charge. Such attempt has named the weapon as 'Pioneer.'

ITEM.name: Arquebus
ITEM.desc: Updated version of an old model which was once quite popular. It has extreme destructive power, but is rather difficult to control.

ITEM.name: Red Arquebus
ITEM.desc: [Rare] Limited Edition of remodeled “Arquebus”. The ammunition capacity for one clip has increased, but is rather difficult to control.

ITEM.name: Storm Bringer
ITEM.desc: A new and unique shotgun with a powerful spray. This new model allows for an extremely large clip. The only drawback is its weight.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Shotgun
ITEM.desc: A common shotgun for new adventurers. By renovating the Breaker's magazine, the maximum number of bullets that it can carry has been increased.

ITEM.name: A-3
ITEM.desc: The trial model of Adam Industry’s new firearms development business. Its performance is not yet sufficient, but it is surprisingly light.

ITEM.name: Thor
ITEM.desc: A great shotgun made with the delicate touch of royal craftsmen. This industrial-era shotgun is highly exquisite and shows better performance than the newest model.

ITEM.name: Iris Rifle
ITEM.desc: Rifle that the Republic's soldiers used to use. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Rifle
ITEM.desc: Rifle used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani.

ITEM.name: Prime TX
ITEM.desc: A rifle focused on fire rate and stability. Its stable and controllable recoil makes it an excellent choice to use.

ITEM.name: Garm
ITEM.desc: The test model which has been developed secretly at Walcom Company. In order to reduce the weight and increase the bullet charge, the newest high technology is introduced to the weapon.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Machine Gun
ITEM.desc: Machine Gun used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Incinerator
ITEM.desc: The latest machine gun model by Adam Heavy Industry. The gun is easy to use and possesses heavy fire power with fully automatic shooting. Its only defect is its heavy weight.

ITEM.name: Iris Machine Gun
ITEM.desc: A machine gun used by Republic soldiers. They put their base names on their guns.

ITEM.name: Iris Rocket
ITEM.desc: A rocket the Republic soldiers used to use. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Rocket
ITEM.desc: A rocket produced for the Iron Crow. Used to dominate Havani, city of outlaws.

ITEM.name: Pressure RX
ITEM.desc: A more balanced rocket launcher. Its damage is somewhat sacrificed but the clip capacity and the reload speed have been improved.

ITEM.name: CRUZ-FX177
ITEM.desc: A latest model weapon identified to be created confidentially at Harvani, the city of outlaws. (Designed by Ryo ^1Shintenzu/Shikamaru ^0from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Jaws Launcher
ITEM.desc: A rocket launcher in the shape of Jaws, the shark. Its performance is dreadfully powerful.

ITEM.name: Breaker 9se
ITEM.desc: Latest model of the Breaker 9 series, made by Rionix. No major changes in ability, but the level restriction got lowered.

ITEM.name: CK-1
ITEM.desc: A stray rocket launcher that can carry more rockets than a normal rocket launcher. It is lighter and does less damage.

ITEM.name: Optimite Launcher
ITEM.desc: Rocket Launcher with the new Optimite warhead. The weight of the warhead is low, which increases the maximum number of missiles fired.

ITEM.name: A-9 Iconoclast
ITEM.desc: Asam Industrial’s latest military rocket launcher packs so much punch it can obliterate buildings, vehicles, barricades - even hopes and dreams. Because of its high production cost, only elite fortune-hunters can afford the A-9, but those lucky few are sure to get their money's worth.

ITEM.name: Clover Ring
ITEM.desc: This ring brings luck and makes you lighter.

ITEM.name: Iron Calvary Ring
ITEM.desc: Powerful magicians designed this ring for the Iron Calvary. Its mighty force makes you feel lighter.

ITEM.name: Ring of the Great Emperor
ITEM.desc: This enchanted ring was designed for the Great Emperor of Ryswick. A mysterious power affects anyone that wears this ring.

ITEM.name: Skill Ring
ITEM.desc: Increases experience and bounty by 20%.

ITEM.name: Lucky Ring
ITEM.desc: A ring that possesses many different mysterious powers. Only one can be equiped at a time.

ITEM.name: Bronze Skill Ring
ITEM.desc: Beginner's version of skill ring. It will increase bounty and experience gained by 15%. Cannot equip the same ring simultaneously.

ITEM.name: Silver Skill Ring
ITEM.desc: Silver skill ring when activated improves learning capability and battle ability. It will increase experience gained by 20%. Cannot equip the same ring simultaneously.

ITEM.name: Gold Skill Ring
ITEM.desc: Gold skill ring when activated awakens battle ability and learning capability to its full potential. It will increase experience gained by 25% and max weight by 3. Cannot equip the same ring simultaneously.

ITEM.name: Lucky Chocolate Bar
ITEM.desc: A delicious looking chocolate. A small amount of both HP and AP are healed at once when eaten.

ITEM.name: Magazine Pouch
ITEM.desc: This Pouch holds three extra magazine clips.

ITEM.name: Medical Kit MX-S1
ITEM.desc: A powerful super lightweight medical kit. Medical Kit MX-S1 heals almost twice more than MK series. (3 bundle pack)

ITEM.name: Medical Kit MX-S2
ITEM.desc: A powerful super lightweight medical kit. Medical Kit MX-S2 heals almost twice more than MK series. (5 bundle pack)

ITEM.name: Repair Kit RX-S1
ITEM.desc: A powerful super lightweight repair kit. Repair Kit RX-S1 heals almost twice more than RK series. (3 bundle pack)

ITEM.name: Repair Kit RX-S2
ITEM.desc: A powerful super lightweight repair kit. Repair Kit RX-S2 heals almost twice more than RK series. (5 bundle pack)

ITEM.name: Ares Military Hat
ITEM.desc: Military combat hat designed by Ares.

ITEM.name: Ceremonial Dress Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Ceremonial dress hat designed by Icon for the Ranks of the Empire to wear at political ceremonies.

ITEM.name: Gunners Heaven Soft Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Exclusive soft hat for the Gunners Heaven crew, it matches a dark colored coat.

ITEM.name: Military Head Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: Basic military head bandana for combat.

ITEM.name: Basic Head Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's Bandana used for fashion.

ITEM.name: Water-Drop Head Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: Practical lightweight bandana with a water drop pattern.

ITEM.name: Star Glaze Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: Soft star glazed pattern bandana for men.

ITEM.name: Eternal Blue Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: This unique hat was designed for the Eternal Blue outlaw crew.

ITEM.name: Adventurer's Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Lightweight hat recommended for novice adventurers who hate outfits with heavy equipment.

ITEM.name: Blue Whistle Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Hat designed for Blue Whistle.

ITEM.name: Coral Reef Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Keep the sun out of your eyes with this cool hat.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Iron Crow warriors wear these protective hats around the city of Havani, the city of outlaws.

ITEM.name: Santa Claus Cap (Men)
ITEM.desc: A Christmas season Santa Cap for men.

ITEM.name: Phantom Breed Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: Heavy bandana designed for the Phantom Breed spy crew.

ITEM.name: Republic Gun Priest Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's hat for a secret organization associated with religious groups.

ITEM.name: Gray Dust Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's hat for the Empire's elite troops.

ITEM.name: Sir Protector Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's Sir Protector Hat, designed for protection.

ITEM.name: Bigi Sports Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: This loud and stylish hat was designed for the Bigi crew members.

ITEM.name: Warrior Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's Warrior Hat used in combat, enhances defensive strength.

ITEM.name: Desert Flame Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Desert Flame hat originally designed for troops that were stationed in desert areas.

ITEM.name: Battle Brood Helmet (Men)
ITEM.desc: Specially designed men's helmet made from all reinforced material. This headgear protects against all types of damage.

ITEM.name: Red Active Sports Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: (Limited-time offer) Men's sportswear suitable for any type of sport. It seems to make you powerful. [Red]

ITEM.name: Yellow Active Sports Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: (Limited-time offer) Men's sportswear suitable for any type of sport. It seems to make you powerful. [Yellow]

ITEM.name: Blue Active Sports Bandana (Men)
ITEM.desc: (Limited-time offer) Men's sportswear suitable for any type of sport. It seems to make you powerful. [Blue]

ITEM.name: Military Officer Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Military officer hat used by war fanatics.

ITEM.name: Classic Leather Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A classic leather hat for men.

ITEM.name: Zeus Hair Band (Men)
ITEM.desc: Stylishly designed lightweight hair band for men. Poor defensive enhancement, but good health bonus.

ITEM.name: Pumpkin Head (Men)
ITEM.desc: Happy Halloween!

ITEM.name: Blue Vane Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's Blue Vane hat made of highly flexible material.

ITEM.name: Train Guard Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's hat worn by soldiers guarding the trains going through the empire and the republic. It has the advantage of being lightweight.

ITEM.name: PA Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's hat worn by the personal assistants of the empire's nobles.

ITEM.name: Divine Hands Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's hat worn by those in the Republic support forces, Healing Hands.

ITEM.name: Bunny Ears Head Band (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's bunny ears head band that can be used as an extra accessory.

ITEM.name: Cat Ears Head Band (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's cat ears head band that can be used as an extra accessory.

ITEM.name: Slider Sports Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's sports hat that is comfortable enough to wear everyday while still maintaining sports functionality.

ITEM.name: Summer Breeze Visor (Men)
ITEM.desc: A sporty visor that works well against harmful sunlight.

ITEM.name: Carpediem School uniform Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Male student's hat at Empire's prestigious high school for the children of noble households.

ITEM.name: Fimbul Winter Headband (Men)
ITEM.desc: Headband for men, used by people who have grown resistance against cold for living in northern territory, far from the mainland, where it is severely cold winter through out the year. (Designed by Azume from NHN GunZ)

ITEM.name: Deities Aura Headset (Men)
ITEM.desc: Headgear for men, used by Brotherhood gang members who have gained immense wealth in enormous speed by using people's faith for god to expand the influential territory. (Designed by Xlll from NHN GunZ)

ITEM.name: Hyper Mouse Head (Men)
ITEM.desc: A helmet which can only be worn once in twelve years.

ITEM.name: Star Tower hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A familiar hat with a stylish picture that looks as if seen somewhere else before.

ITEM.name: Big Fun Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: A festival wig that will enhance your festive mood.

ITEM.name: Valkyrie Headset (Men)
ITEM.desc: Valkyrie Headset for the adventurers who are active even during harsh winter. It is flexible enough for outdoor activity and keeps warmth. (Designed by Valkyrie† from Brazil GunZ)

ITEM.name: Scrider's Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Hat worn by those who worship Scrider, the demented god of destruction.

ITEM.name: Icarus Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Icarus Hat worn by the airplane pilots from Ares who fly across the Astra continent.

ITEM.name: Koala Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Hat worn by people who reside in the southern island. This hat is cute and unique to its geographical location.

ITEM.name: Xian Tactical Assassin Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: Highly customized mask worn by the Xian Tactical Assassin Unit (XTA). Their unit is recognized for their high moral conviction and swift execution of a “higher law”, earning them the title: “The Shadows of Justice”. (Designed by Ryo Shintenzu/Shikamaru from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Kung fu Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Kung fu wig that carries the soul of a legendary Kung fu fighter which makes one feel like a Kung fu master.

ITEM.name: Heavy Metal Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Heavy Metal Hat for free souls who enjoy traveling wherever.

ITEM.name: Judgement Hair Ornament (Men)
ITEM.desc: A hair ornament for the chosen one who has received the supreme call from the divine being. (Designed by Nhu Tu/ Wing Age from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Axium Noble Formal Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A formal hat worn by the young men of noble families in Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Tuxedo Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: A tuxedo wig for a wedding that has a sharp and elegant touch.

ITEM.name: Navy Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A uniform hat worn by the navy army soldiers of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Yohawk Headband (Men)
ITEM.desc: A traditional head band of the Yohawk clan who have fought vigorously against the merge with the Republic during the foundation of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Magician Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A felted hat worn by the disciples of Ramitz during the renaissance of forgotten magic flourished by Ramitz.

ITEM.name: Devil's Horns (Men)
ITEM.desc: Devil's Horns worn by the young lads to celebrate the Independence Day of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Police Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A hat worn by the Police officers who ensure the safety of the republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Fenrir Guardian Helmet (Men)

ITEM.name: White Winter Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A white winter hat that is great for a snowy day. (Men)

ITEM.name: Reindeer Hair Band (Men)
ITEM.desc: A reindeer hair band for a snowy winter day. Increases EXP earned by 20%

ITEM.name: Sun Rang Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A hat of Sun Rang, a private group of the sons of nobility who devote their training to a healthy mind and body.

ITEM.name: Axium Hitman Hair (Men)
ITEM.desc: Man’s wig for the formal meeting of the Axium hitmen, who are the best assassins of underworld for never missing the target and leaving no trace.

ITEM.name: Travia Cryinghawks Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men’s wig for Travia Cryinghawks, a mercenary clan. The members of this clan value honor and social justice, and are admired by other mercenaries.

ITEM.name: Axium Soulreaper Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men’s wig for Axium Soulreaper, the cleric of Republican church who absorbs possessed souls and cures the sick patients.

ITEM.name: Axium High-Class Soulreaper Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's formal wig for the high-class Soulreapers who have been elevated by curing the souls of one thousand people.

ITEM.name: Victory Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A fan’s wishful hat for the victory of the game. (Men)

ITEM.name: Travia Preacher Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: The official wig for the preachers of the Travia church, who are determined to make justice a reality by spreading the word of God and punishing heathens.

ITEM.name: Shark Teeth Tricorne (Men)
ITEM.desc: A tricorne of the Empire navy’s worst enemy, the Shark Teeth, who had power over the Astra ocean. They have made the people of sea tremble with fear with their ferociousness and cruelty.

ITEM.name: Cowboy Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A hat worn by the cowboys, who pioneered the barren and untapped territory of the western continent of Astra.

ITEM.name: Skull Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: A skull mask with a smile on it, which tempts people to wear it.

ITEM.name: Rebel Agent Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: A man’s wig for the assassin members of Rebel Agent, who are mysterious even to the Empire Information Division.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Clan Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: A man’s wig for members of the Black Dragon Clan, an alliance of merchants and hunters who have risen to fight against the tyranny of the corrupt Establishment.

ITEM.name: Tactical Ninja Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: A mask for the Tactical Ninja, a special combat group that has been secretly working for the Republic for Travia from a remote location.

ITEM.name: Crusader Helmet (Men)
ITEM.desc: A helmet worn by those who dedicated themselves as Knights. These brave Knights swore allegiance to those who shared common beliefs and a common faith. (Designed by Radiate from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Deep Blue Diving Goggle (Men)
ITEM.desc: Diving goggles of the Deep Blue SEAL, a special forces group for the Republic of Travia who perform their duties deep under water.

ITEM.name: Rabbit Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: Adorable Rabbit mask. It is rather heavy due to its large size but it is good for protection.

ITEM.name: Junior Hipster Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Casual hair for the hipsters of the Hunter Alliance. It provides excellent defense but is suprisingly heavy.

ITEM.name: THUG Beanie (Men)
ITEM.desc: A beanie worn by the members of the Travia Republic’s famous gang, the Travian Heathen Underground.

ITEM.name: Eskimo Fur Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A fur hat worn by Eskimo hunters from the Artic region of Northern Astra. This thick fur hat is great for keeping warm, but more importantly it's heavy on defense.

ITEM.name: Bloody Magician Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A felt hat worn by the disciples who fought against Ramitz to stop his rampage of corruption. Ramitz is the magician who once flourished during the Renaissance of the Forgotten Magic.

ITEM.name: Private Investigator Fedora (Men)
ITEM.desc: A Private Investigator's hat of the Empire's private detective organization.

ITEM.name: Panda Mask (Men)

ITEM.name: Researcher Glasses (Men)

ITEM.name: Eagle Mask (Men)

ITEM.name: Snowman Mask (Men)

ITEM.name: Black Knight Mohawk
ITEM.desc: A mohawk favored by the Black Knights, a group of battle-hungry crusaders fighting the criminal gangs of the Republic's underworld.

ITEM.name: Guerrilla Commando Bandana
ITEM.desc: Though ragged and shabby, guerilla leaders wear their tattered clothes like a badge of honor, a constant reminder of the reasons for rebelling against the Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Leopard Clan Beret
ITEM.desc: Members of the Leopard Clan clad themselves in the spots of their namesake to pay tribute to its prowess as a hunter and ability to camouflage. Operating invisibly in both the Empire and the Republic, the clan is known for their savagery and ruthlessness.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Mask
ITEM.desc: This bearded dragon mask was created to celebrate the Year of the Dragon. It might look like a mere costume piece, but its scaly hide has been infused with magic and can stop bullets!

ITEM.name: Shamanic Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: These ritualistic tribal masks are decorated with flora found in the wild. The tribute to nature is said to open spiritual pathways to the gods.

ITEM.name: Imperial Hunter Field Cap (Men)
ITEM.desc: Imperial Hunters are elite bondsmen on direct retainer from the royal family of the Axium Empire. This field cap commands instant recognition and deference.

ITEM.name: Wayfarer Haircut (Men)
ITEM.desc: The nomadic tribes of the borderlands live hardscrabble lives. Everything they wear, including their hair, must be spare and unobtrusive.

ITEM.name: Amphibious Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: Cheeky as this mask may seem, in the borderlands frogs are symbols of poison and apparition. Besides, imagine the humiliation one might feel in losing a duel to a man dressed like a frog.

ITEM.desc: Military hat for female soldiers. Designed by Rex.

ITEM.desc: Upper garment for men, used by Brotherhood gang members who have gained immense wealth in enormous speed by using people's faith for god to expand the influential territory. (Designed by Xlll from NHN GunZ)

ITEM.name: Maple Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: A familiar shirt with a vivid Maple logo on its chest. It has a refreshing scent of far away land.

ITEM.name: Valkyrie Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Valkyrie Coat for the adventurers who are active even during harsh winter. It is flexible enough for outdoor activity and keeps warmth. (Designed by Valkyrie† from Brazil GunZ)

ITEM.name: Scrider's Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Coat worn by those who worship Scrider, the demented god of destruction.

ITEM.name: Icarus Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: Icarus Jacket worn by the airplane pilots from Ares who fly across the Astra continent.

ITEM.name: Colorful Striped Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: 3 colored striped shirt worn by the brave who want to stand out in battle.

ITEM.name: Ancient vest (Men)
ITEM.desc: Vest worn by ancient warriors from a distant land.

ITEM.name: Xian Tactical Assassin Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Highly customized coat worn by the Xian Tactical Assassin Unit (XTA). Their unit is recognized for their high moral conviction and swift execution of a “higher law”, earning them the title: “The Shadows of Justice”. (Designed by Ryo Shintenzu/Shikamaru from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Kung fu Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: Yellow Kung fu shirt that carries the soul of a legendary Kung fu fighter which makes one feel like a Kung fu master.

ITEM.name: Heavy Metal Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: Heavy Metal Jacket for free souls who enjoy traveling wherever.

ITEM.name: Judgement Upper Garment (Men)
ITEM.desc: An upper garment for the chosen one who has received the supreme call from the divine being. (Designed by Nhu Tu/ Wing Age from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Axium Noble Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: A formal jacket worn by the young men of noble families in Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Tuxedo Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: A tuxedo jacket for a wedding that has a sharp and elegant touch.

ITEM.name: Navy Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: A uniform shirt worn by the navy army soldiers of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Yohawk Vest (Men)
ITEM.desc: A traditional vest of the Yohawk clan who have fought vigorously against the merge with the Republic during the foundation of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Magician Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A coat worn by the disciples of Ramitz during the renaissance of forgetting magic flourished by Ramitz.

ITEM.name: Devil's Wings (Men)
ITEM.desc: Devil's Wings worn by the young lads to celebrate the Independence Day of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Wing of Kali Azar
ITEM.desc: Wings created by the followers of Kali Azar, the god of disease and suffering. This wings imitate the wings of Kali and are used for the ritual.

ITEM.name: Police Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: A Shirt worn by the Police officers who ensure the safety of the republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Fenrir Guardian Garment (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's Fenrir special forces combat uniform, who's job is to guard the President of Travia. A solid and top quality made garment with top priority given to high defensive power for the protection of the wearer.

ITEM.name: Fenrir Guardian Field Garment (Men)
ITEM.desc: [Rare] This is the Mens Fenrir special forces combat uniform, who's job is to guard the President of Travia.

ITEM.name: White Winter Top (Men)
ITEM.desc: A white winter top that is great for a snowy day. (Men)

ITEM.name: Sun Rang Garment (Men)
ITEM.desc: A garment of Sun Rang, a private group of the sons of nobility who devote their training to a healthy mind and body.

ITEM.name: Axium Hitman Fur Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Man’s fur coat for the formal meeting of the Axium hitmen, who are the best assassins of underworld for never missing the target and leaving no trace.

ITEM.name: Travia Cryinghawks Leather Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men’s leather jacket for Travia Cryinghawks, a mercenary clan. The members of this clan value honor and social justice, and are admired by other mercenaries.

ITEM.name: Axium Soulreaper Jumper (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men’s jumper for Axium Soulreaper, the cleric of Republican church who absorbs possessed souls and cures the sick patients.

ITEM.name: Axium High-Class Soulreaper Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's formal coat for the high-class Soulreapers who have been elevated by curing the souls of one thousand people.

ITEM.name: Travia Preacher Robe (Men)
ITEM.desc: The official robe for the preachers of the Travia church, who are determined to make justice a reality by spreading the word of God and punishing heathens.

ITEM.name: Shark Teeth Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A coat of the Empire navy’s worst enemy, the Shark Teeth, who had power over the Astra ocean. They have made the people of sea tremble with fear with their ferociousness and cruelty.

ITEM.name: Cowboy Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: A jacket worn by the cowboys, who pioneered the barren and untapped territory of the western continent of Astra.

ITEM.name: Rebel Agent Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A man’s coat for the assassin members of Rebel Agent, who are mysterious even to the Empire Information Division.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Clan Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: A man’s shirt for members of the Black Dragon Clan, an alliance of merchants and hunters who have risen to fight against the tyranny of the corrupt Establishment.

ITEM.name: Tactical Ninja Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: A shirt for the Tactical Ninja, a special combat group that has been secretly working for the Republic for Travia from a remote location.

ITEM.name: Crusader Top (Men)
ITEM.desc: A cuirass worn by those who dedicated themselves as Knights. These brave Knights swore allegiance to those who shared common beliefs and a common faith. (Designed by Radiate from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Deep Blue Diving Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: A diving shirt for the Deep Blue SEAL, a special forces team of the Republic of Travia who perform their duty deep under water.

ITEM.name: Junior Hipster Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: Casual jacket for the hipsters of the Hunter Alliance. It provides excellent defense but is suprisingly heavy.

ITEM.name: THUG Tank-top (Men)
ITEM.desc: A tank-top worn by the members of the Travia Republic’s famous gang, the Travian Heathen Underground.

ITEM.name: Eskimo Jacket (Men)
ITEM.desc: A jacket worn by Eskimo hunters from the Artic region of Northern Astra. This thick fur jacket is great for keeping warm, but more importantly it's heavy on defense.

ITEM.name: Bloody Magician coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A coat worn by the disciples who fought against Ramitz to stop his rampage of corruption. Ramitz is the magician who once flourished during the Renaissance of the Forgotten Magic.

ITEM.name: Private Investigator Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A Private Investigator's coat of the Empire's private detective organization.

ITEM.name: Researcher Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's researcher coat from Adam Industry, a munitions company.

ITEM.name: Cleric Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A men's coat of the Axium Empire inquisitors who protect the state religion.

ITEM.name: Veteran Guerilla Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: A men's shirt worn by the rebellion guerillas who oppose the Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Travia Miner Work Top (Men)
ITEM.desc: A men's work top of the Travia Republic miners.

ITEM.name: Black Knight Trenchcoat
ITEM.desc: A coat favored by the Black Knights, a group of battle-hungry crusaders fighting the criminal gangs of the Republic's underworld.

ITEM.name: Guerrilla Commando Uniform Jacket
ITEM.desc: Though ragged and shabby, guerilla leaders wear their tattered clothes like a badge of honor, a constant reminder of the reasons for rebelling against the Axium Empire. Plus, men with gunz don't need sleeves.

ITEM.name: Leopard Clan Trenchcoat
ITEM.desc: Members of the Leopard Clan clad themselves in the spots of their namesake to pay tribute to its prowess as a hunter and ability to camouflage. Operating invisibly in both the Empire and the Republic, the clan is known for their savagery and ruthlessness. This coat is a must-have to truly pimp yourself out.

ITEM.name: Imperial Hunter Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Imperial Hunters are elite bondsmen on direct retainer from the royal family of the Axium Empire. The trademark heavy wool overcoat is paired with a matching cloak and mantle.

ITEM.name: Wayfarer Coat (Men)
ITEM.desc: The nomadic tribes of the borderlands live hardscrabble lives. This worn leather duster has been cut short to prevent the flaps from impeding leg movement, while still providing protection from the elements.

ITEM.name: Ceremonial Dress Jacket (Women)
ITEM.desc: A ceremonial dress jacket supplied to the female soldiers of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Gunners Heaven Long Wool Coat (Women)
ITEM.desc: A women's long wool coat and garment exclusively for the Gunners Heaven, a private organization of the Republic.

ITEM.name: Eternal Blue Coat (Women)
ITEM.desc: For outlaws of the sea, Eternal Blue women's pirate garment.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Jacket (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's jacket recommended for novice adventurers. This item is made for those who hate to wear heavy gear.

ITEM.name: Blue Whistle Jacket (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's Blue Whistle jacket, Blue Whistle is known as the headache of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Coral Reef Bikini Top (Women)

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Coat (Women)

ITEM.name: Mrs. Claus Coat (Women)

ITEM.desc: Members of the Leopard Clan clad themselves in the spots of their namesake to pay tribute to its prowess as a hunter and ability to camouflage. Operating invisibly in both the Empire and the Republic, the clan is known for their savagery and ruthlessness.

ITEM.name: Blade Matrix Gloves
ITEM.desc: These robotic cyberpunk gloves help you lift heavy objects and terminate your opponents.

ITEM.name: Ghoulrot Hands
ITEM.desc: A single injection of mildly acidic monster blood into the center of your palm will morph your hands into grotesque fists of incredible strength. Completely painless, I promise!

ITEM.desc: Imperial Hunters are elite bondsmen on direct retainer from the royal family of the Axium Empire. Their gloves are made from the rarest chimera hide, as a gesture of elitism.

ITEM.name: Wayfarer Gloves (Men)
ITEM.desc: The nomadic tribes of the borderlands live hardscrabble lives, and often must brave harsh weather or climb abrasive rock. These open-finger gloves provide the perfect combination of flexibility and protection.

ITEM.name: Blue Vane Trousers (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's Blue Vane Skirt made of highly flexible material.

ITEM.name: Train Guard Trousers (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's trousers worn by soldiers guarding the trains going through the empire and the republic. It has the advantage of being lightweight.

ITEM.name: PA Dress Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's pants worn by the personal assistants of the empire's nobles.

ITEM.name: Divine Hands Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's skirt worn by those in the Republic support forces, Healing Hands.

ITEM.name: Slider Sports Shorts (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's sports pants that are comfortable enough to wear everyday while still maintaining sports functionality.

ITEM.name: Summer Breeze Short Shorts (Women)
ITEM.desc: Short shorts that are worn over bikini bottoms.

ITEM.name: Carpediem School uniform Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Female student's miniskirt at Empire's prestigious high school for the children of noble households.

ITEM.name: Fimbul Winter Trousers (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pants for women, used by people who have grown resistance against cold for living in northern territory, far from the mainland, where it is severely cold winter through out the year. (Designed by Azume from NHN GunZ)

ITEM.name: Deities Aura Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pants for women, used by Brotherhood gang members who have gained immense wealth in enormous speed by using people's faith for god to expand the influential territory. (Designed by Xlll from NHN GunZ)

ITEM.name: Valkyrie Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Valkyrie Pants for the adventurers who are active even during harsh winter. They are flexible enough for outdoor activity and keep warmth. (Designed by Valkyrie† from Brazil GunZ)

ITEM.name: Scrider's Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pants worn by those who worship Scrider, the demented god of destruction.

ITEM.name: Icarus Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Icarus Pants worn by the airplane pilots from Ares who fly across the Astra continent.

ITEM.name: Xian Tactical Assassin Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Highly customized pants worn by the Xian Tactical Assassin Unit (XTA). Their unit is recognized for their high moral conviction and swift execution of a “higher law”, earning them the title: “The Shadows of Justice”. (Designed by Ryo Shintenzu/Shikamaru from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Kung fu Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Yellow Kung fu pants that carry the soul of a legendary Kung fu fighter which makes one feel like a Kung fu master.

ITEM.name: Heavy Metal Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Heavy Metal Skirt for free souls who enjoy traveling wherever.

ITEM.name: Judgement Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A skirt for the chosen one who has received the supreme call from the divine being. (Designed by Nhu Tu/ Wing Age from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Axium Noble Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A formal skirt worn by the young women of noble families in Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Wedding Lower Garment (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pure white wedding lower garment of every girl's dream, in cheerful minimal style.

ITEM.name: Navy Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Uniform skirt worn by the navy army soldiers of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Yohawk Shorts (Women)
ITEM.desc: Traditional shorts of the Yohawk clan who have fought vigorously against the merge with the Republic during the foundation of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Magician Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A skirt worn by the disciples of Ramitz during the renaissance of forgetting magic flourished by Ramitz.

ITEM.name: Angel's Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Angel's skirt worn by the young ladies to celebrate the Independence Day of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Police Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pants worn by the Police officers who ensure the safety of the republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Fenrir Guardian Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's Fenrir special forces combat uniform, who's job is to guard the President of Travia. A solid and top quality made pants with top priority given to high defensive power for the protection of the wearer.

ITEM.name: Fenrir Guardian Field Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: [Rare] This is the Womens Fenrir special forces combat uniform, who's job is to guard the President of Travia.

ITEM.name: White Winter Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A white winter skirt that is great for a snowy day. (Women)

ITEM.name: Sun Rang Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pants of Sun Rang, a private group of the daughters of nobility who devote their training to a healthy mind and body.

ITEM.name: Axium Hitman Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Woman’s skirt for the formal meeting of the Axium hitmen, who are the best assassins of underworld for never missing the target and leaving no trace.

ITEM.name: Travia Cryinghawks Skinny Jeans (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's skinny jeans for Travia Cryinghawks, a mercenary clan. The members of this clan value honor and social justice, and are admired by other mercenaries.

ITEM.name: Axium Soulreaper Skinny pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women’s skinny pants for Axium Soulreaper, the cleric of Republican church who absorbs possessed souls and cures the sick patients.

ITEM.name: Axium High-Class Soulreaper shorts (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's formal shorts for the high-class Soulreapers who have been elevated by curing the souls of one thousand people.

ITEM.name: Travia Preacher Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: The official pants for the preachers of the Travia church, who are determined to make justice a reality by spreading the word of God and punishing heathens.

ITEM.name: Shark Teeth Garter Belt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A garter belt of the Empire navy’s worst enemy,the Shark Teeth, who had power over the Astra ocean. They have made the people of sea tremble with fear with their ferociousness and cruelty.

ITEM.name: Cowgirl Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A skirt worn by the cowgirls, who pioneered the barren and untapped territory of the western continent of Astra.

ITEM.name: Rebel Agent Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women’s pants for the assassin members of Rebel Agent, who are mysterious even to the Empire Information Division.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Clan Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A woman’s skirt for members of the Black Dragon Clan, an alliance of merchants and hunters who have risen to fight against the tyranny of the corrupt Establishment.

ITEM.name: Tactical Ninja Garter Belt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A garter belt for the Tactical Ninja, Female special combat group that has been secretly working for the Republic for Travia from a remote location.

ITEM.name: Crusader Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A skirt worn by those who dedicated themselves as Knights. These brave Knights swore allegiance to those who shared common beliefs and a common faith. (Designed by Radiate from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Deep Blue Diving pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Diving pants for the Deep Blue SEAL, a special forces team of the Republic of Travia who perform their duty deep under water.

ITEM.name: Junior Hipster Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Casual pants for the hipsters of the Hunter Alliance. They provide excellent defense but are suprisingly heavy.

ITEM.name: THUG Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pants worn by the members of the Travia Republic’s famous gang, the Travian Heathen Underground.

ITEM.name: Eskimo Stockings (Women)
ITEM.desc: Pants worn by Eskimo hunters from the Artic region of Northern Astra. The pants are great for keeping warm, but more importantly it's heavy on defense.

ITEM.name: Bloody Magician Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A skirt worn by the disciples who fought against Ramitz to stop his rampage of corruption. Ramitz is the magician who once flourished during the Renaissance of the Forgotten Magic.

ITEM.name: Private Investigator Shorts (Women)
ITEM.desc: Private Investigator's shorts of the Empire's private detective organization.

ITEM.name: Researcher Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's researcher skirt from Adam Industry, a munitions company.

ITEM.name: Cleric Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's pants of the Axium Empire inquisitors who protect the state religion.

ITEM.name: Veteran Guerilla Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's pants worn by the rebellion guerillas who oppose the Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Travia Miner Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's pants of the Travia Republic miners.

ITEM.name: Black Dame Mini
ITEM.desc: A skirt favored by the Black Knights, a group of battle-hungry crusaders fighting the criminal gangs of the Republic's underworld. It shows just enough skin to distract your enemies while you reduce them to red mist.

ITEM.name: Guerrilla Commandtrix Pants
ITEM.desc: Though ragged and shabby, guerilla leaders wear their tattered clothes like a badge of honor, a constant reminder of the reasons for rebelling against the Axium Empire. The leg torn off these pants lends you the air of a battle-hardened seductress.

ITEM.name: Jungle Queen Mini
ITEM.desc: Members of the Leopard Clan clad themselves in the spots of their namesake to pay tribute to its prowess as a hunter and ability to camouflage. Operating invisibly in both the Empire and the Republic, the clan is known for their savagery and ruthlessness.

ITEM.name: Imperial Hunter Pants (Women)
ITEM.desc: Imperial Hunters are elite bondswomen on direct retainer from the royal family of the Axium Empire. Their pants, while durable, are custom-tailored on an individual basis using the finest available cloth.

ITEM.name: Wayfarer Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: The nomadic tribes of the borderlands live hardscrabble lives. The females will often opt for the uninhibited freedom of a loose skirt, for maximum movement and flexibility.

ITEM.desc: Iron Crow warriors wear these protective shoes around the city of Havani, the city of outlaws.

ITEM.name: Tactical Ninja Shoes (Women)
ITEM.desc: Shoes for the Tactical Ninja, a special combat group that has been secretly working for the Republic for Travia from a remote location.

ITEM.name: Crusader Boots (Women)
ITEM.desc: Greaves worn by those who dedicated themselves as Knights. These brave Knights swore allegiance to those who shared common beliefs and a common faith. (Designed by Radiate from NA GunZ)

ITEM.name: Deep Blue Diving Boots (Women)
ITEM.desc: Diving boots for the Deep Blue SEAL, a special forces team of the Republic of Travia who perform their duty deep under water.

ITEM.name: Junior Hipster Sneakers (Women)
ITEM.desc: Casual sneakers for the hipsters of the Hunter Alliance. They provide excellent defense but are suprisingly heavy.

ITEM.name: THUG Sneakers (Women)
ITEM.desc: Sneakers worn by the members of the Travia Republic’s famous gang, the Travian Heathen Underground.

ITEM.name: Eskimo Boots (Women)
ITEM.desc: Boots worn by Eskimo hunters from the Artic region of Northern Astra. The boots are great for keeping your feet dry, but more importantly it's heavy on defense.

ITEM.name: Bloody Magician Shoes (Women)
ITEM.desc: Shoes worn by the disciples who fought against Ramitz to stop his rampage of corruption. Ramitz is the magician who once flourished during the Renaissance of the Forgotten Magic.

ITEM.name: Private Investigator Shoes (Women)
ITEM.desc: Private Investigator's shoes of the Empire's private detective organization.

ITEM.name: Researcher Boots (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's researcher boots from Adam Industry, a munitions company.

ITEM.name: Cleric Shoes (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's shoes of the Axium Empire inquisitors who protect the state religion.

ITEM.name: Veteran Guerilla Combat Shoes (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's combat shoes worn by the rebellion guerillas who oppose the Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Travia Miner Boots (Women)
ITEM.desc: Women's boots of the Travia Republic miners.

ITEM.name: Black Dame Leather Legwarmers
ITEM.desc: Shoes and legwarmers favored by the Black Knights, a group of battle-hungry crusaders fighting the criminal gangs of the Republic's underworld.

ITEM.name: Guerrilla Commandtrix Boots
ITEM.desc: Though ragged and shabby, guerilla leaders wear their tattered clothes like a badge of honor, a constant reminder of the reasons for rebelling against the Axium Empire. The shin bandage is included to trick enemies into thinking you're weak, giving you the chance to blast their brains onto the brick wall behind them.

ITEM.name: Jungle Queen Boots
ITEM.desc: Members of the Leopard Clan clad themselves in the spots of their namesake to pay tribute to its prowess as a hunter and ability to camouflage. Operating invisibly in both the Empire and the Republic, the clan is known for their savagery and ruthlessness.

ITEM.name: Imperial Hunter Boots (Women)
ITEM.desc: Imperial Hunters are elite bondswomen on direct retainer from the royal family of the Axium Empire. While the men favor a low workman's boot cut, the women prefer thigh-length boots with ankle cuffs.

ITEM.name: Wayfarer Boots (Women)
ITEM.desc: The nomadic tribes of the borderlands live hardscrabble lives. These boots are comfortable but durable; ideal for sustained periods of travel.

ITEM.name: Shadow Avatar (Men)
ITEM.desc: This Avatar, shaped by the Shadow of the Dark Age, transforms into body armor when equipped. It once had supernatural powers but now only possesses transformative power.

ITEM.name: Dried Brain (Men)
ITEM.desc: A mysterious artifact found in the ruins of the northern continent. Legend has it that this item will give an immortal body to anyone that possess it.

ITEM.name: Battle suit (Men)
ITEM.desc: Next-generation personal battle equipment made by Adam Industry. Only a few prototype versions exist.

ITEM.name: Hunter Uniform (Men)
ITEM.desc: Initial version of the uniform provided to the outstanding hunters recognized by the Hunter’s union.

ITEM.name: Gem of Forest (Men)
ITEM.desc: A gem with the blessing of the forest. The one who possesses this gem will be transformed into a forest fairy by the sprit of the trees.

ITEM.name: Invisibility Suit (Men)
ITEM.desc: A mysterious Invisibility Suit that an unknown researcher dedicated his entire life to make. Unfortunately, no one knows how to make the suit anymore.

ITEM.name: Bloody Battle Suit (Men)
ITEM.desc: A lean-shaped new type of battle suit made by Adam Industry. It is still in its prototype stage.

ITEM.name: Scarecrow (Men)
ITEM.desc: A scarecrow with some secret energy that allows it to hold the souls of people.

ITEM.name: Shadow Suit (Men)
ITEM.desc: A combat uniform of the Secret Imperial special force 'Shadow Knights.'

ITEM.name: Cursed Blood (Men)
ITEM.desc: A glass bottle filled with dark red blood. Dismal, inhuman energy surrounds the bottle.

ITEM.name: Lycanlith
ITEM.desc: This mystical gem unlocks the bestial nature that slumbers in each of us.

ITEM.name: Paladin Armor
ITEM.desc: This fine armor is crafted from concentrated quicksilver, solidified by magic. It was traditionally worn only by the highest-ranking knights of the Axium Empire's Templars, but a few sets became available on the black market after rebels broke into the Empire's armory.

ITEM.name: Cursed Bandage (Men)
ITEM.desc: These ominous bandage wraps were discovered during the excavatation of the King’s Tomb. Touching it seems to summon a putrid breeze carrying angry whispers in an ancient tongue.

ITEM.name: Blue Crystals (Men)
ITEM.desc: Mysterious beings with exoskeletons made of crystals the color and temperature of ice.

ITEM.name: Shadow Avatar (Women)
ITEM.desc: This Avatar, shaped by the Shadow of the Dark Age, transforms into body armor when equipped. It once had supernatural powers but now only possesses transformative power.

ITEM.name: Dried Brain (Women)
ITEM.desc: A mysterious artifact found in the ruins of the northern continent. Legend has it that this item will give an immortal body to anyone that possess it.

ITEM.name: Battle Suit (Women)
ITEM.desc: Next-generation personal battle equipment made by Adam Industry. Only a few prototype versions exist.

ITEM.name: Hunter Uniform (Women)
ITEM.desc: Initial version of the uniform provided to the outstanding hunters recognized by the Hunter’s union.

ITEM.name: Gem of Forest (Women)
ITEM.desc: A gem with the blessing of the forest. The one who possesses this gem will be transformed into a forest fairy by the sprit of the trees.

ITEM.name: Scarecrow (Women)
ITEM.desc: A scarecrow with some secret energy that allows it to hold the souls of people.

ITEM.name: Shadow Suit (Women)
ITEM.desc: A combat uniform of the Secret Imperial special force 'Shadow Knights.'

ITEM.name: Cursed Blood (Women)
ITEM.desc: A glass bottle filled with dark red blood. Dismal, inhuman energy surrounds the bottle.

ITEM.name: Moonstone
ITEM.desc: This mystical gem unlocks the bestial nature that slumbers in each of us.

ITEM.name: Saint Armor
ITEM.desc: This fine armor is crafted from concentrated quicksilver, solidified by magic. It was traditionally worn only by the highest-ranking knights of the Axium Empire's Templars, but a few sets became available on the black market after rebels broke into the Empire's armory.

ITEM.name: Cursed Bandage (Women)
ITEM.desc: These ominous bandage wraps were discovered during the excavatation of the King’s Tomb. Touching it seems to summon a putrid breeze carrying angry whispers in an ancient tongue.

ITEM.name: Blue Crystals (Women)
ITEM.desc: Mysterious beings with exoskeletons made of crystals the color and temperature of ice.
