ITEM.name: Goblin King's Rocket
ITEM.desc: A rocket which was discovered from a Goblin King's dead body. The design is very unique.

ITEM.name: Demon Bringer
ITEM.desc: A sword which was taken from the Giant Skeleton. It is extremely strong, but also cursed.

ITEM.name: Goblin Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A silly looking hat which resembles a goblin's face. It does not have great defensive attributes, but it is fun to wear.

ITEM.name: Goblin Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: A silly looking hat which resembles a goblin's face. It does not have great defensive attributes, but it is fun to wear.

ITEM.name: Demon Hand (Men)
ITEM.desc: A glove with an unknown dark force. It feels a lot heavier than it looks.

ITEM.name: Demon Hand (Women)
ITEM.desc: A glove with an unknown dark force. It feels a lot heavier than it looks.

ITEM.name: Odd Gun x2
ITEM.desc: Odd Gun is a very strange gun which is made from various animals' bones and flesh. How the gun operates is still a mystery.

ITEM.name: Wings of Catastrophe
ITEM.desc: Wings of Catastrophe is a Kodachi that was modeled on wings and tail of Lich. It has been said that a part of Lich's body was used to create the weapon.

ITEM.name: Leather Wrap Shoes (Men)
ITEM.desc: Defense of Leather Wrap Shoes was highly improved by the leather which is firmly wrapped around.

ITEM.name: Leather Wrap Shoes (Women)
ITEM.desc: Defense of Leather Wrap Shoes was highly improved by the leather which is firmly wrapped around.

ITEM.name: Dark Lord Trousers (Men)
ITEM.desc: This unique item is Dark Lord's precious clothing which reveals his evil senses and identity.

ITEM.name: Dark Lord Trousers (Women)
ITEM.desc: This unique item is Dark Lord's precious clothing which reveals her evil senses and identity.

ITEM.name: Shattered Iron
ITEM.desc: A fast shooting shotgun with three gun muzzles that shoots metal splinters with extreme speed.

ITEM.name: Battle Axe
ITEM.desc: An expensive looking axe by a human craftsman. It is too small for Lizardman to use so it must have been decoration.

ITEM.name: Android Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: A realistic looking male mask of Android's face used for parties.

ITEM.name: Android Mask (Woman)
ITEM.desc: A realistic looking female mask of Android's face used for parties.

ITEM.name: Lizardskin Gloves (Men)
ITEM.desc: Men's leather gloves made of Lizardman's skin. It's durable and sturdy but a bit rigid like armor.

ITEM.name: Lizardskin Gloves (Woman)
ITEM.desc: Women's leather gloves made of Lizardman's skin. It's durable and sturdy but a bit rigid like armor.

ITEM.name: Goblin Commander's Club
ITEM.desc: Club carried by the Goblin Commander, It looks interesting but it doesn’t look so useful.

ITEM.name: Goblin Wizard's Armguard (Men)
ITEM.desc: Armguard used by the Goblin Wizard. It looks light and not so sturdy.

ITEM.name: Goblin Wizard's Armguard (Women)
ITEM.desc: Armguard used by the Goblin Wizard. It looks light and not so sturdy.

ITEM.name: Golden Goblin Launcher
ITEM.desc: Gold Goblin Launcher taken from the Thunder Goblin. It looks stronger than the Goblin King's Rocket.

ITEM.name: Golden Goblin Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Gold Goblin Hat from taken from the Thunder Goblin. It looks more useful than the Goblin Hat.

ITEM.name: Golden Goblin Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: Gold Goblin Hat from taken from the Thunder Goblin. It looks more useful than the Goblin Hat.

ITEM.name: Golden Goblin Club
ITEM.desc: Gold Goblin Club taken from the Dwarf Goblin King. It looks stronger than the Goblin commander's club

ITEM.name: Golden Goblin Armguard (Men)
ITEM.desc: Gold Goblin Armguard taken from the Dwarf Goblin King. It looks stronger than the Goblin Wizard’s Armguard

ITEM.name: Golden Goblin Armguard (Women)
ITEM.desc: Gold Goblin Armguard taken from the Dwarf Goblin King. It looks stronger than the Goblin Wizard’s Armguard

ITEM.name: Palmpow's Launcher
ITEM.desc: Palmpow's launcher taken from Palmpow. It seems much more powerful than it looks.

ITEM.name: Palmpoa's Shirt (Men)
ITEM.desc: Palmpoa's Shirt taken from Palmpow. The cute Palmpoa on the back makes one feel sorry to wear it as protective equipment.

ITEM.name: Palmpoa's Shirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: Palmpoa's Shirt taken from Palmpow. The cute Palmpoa on the back makes one feel sorry to wear it as protective equipment.

ITEM.name: Palmpow's Ice Blade
ITEM.desc: Palmpow's Ice Blade taken from Cursed Palmpow. It seems as strong as it looks.

ITEM.name: Palmpoa's Helmet (Men)
ITEM.desc: Palmpoa's Helmet taken from Cursed Palmpow. One might look as cute as Palmpoa when wear it.

ITEM.name: Palmpoa's Helmet (Women)
ITEM.desc: Palmpoa's Helmet taken from Cursed Palmpow. One might look as cute as Palmpoa when wear it.

ITEM.name: 행운의 0번 티켓(이벤트 티켓)
ITEM.desc: 이벤트 숫자아이템을 모두 모으면 이벤트에 당첨되는 행운의 0번 티켓.

ITEM.name: Ring of Darkage
ITEM.desc: An old metal ring. It is worn out and doesn't seem to have much value.

ITEM.name: Silver Coin of Darkage
ITEM.desc: A silver coin used in the past. You can no longer use this coin for currency, but it has value as an antique.

ITEM.name: Gold Coin of Darkage
ITEM.desc: A gold coin used in past. You can no longer use this coin for currency, but it has value as an antique.

ITEM.name: Topaz
ITEM.desc: Neatly crafted topaz. It is something that a jeweler would surely desire.

ITEM.name: Ruby
ITEM.desc: A bright-red ruby that almost reminds one of the color of blood. It is quite antique, but it can receive a high price because it hasn't lost its glow.

ITEM.name: Diamond
ITEM.desc: A big diamond. Needless to say, it is very difficult to find.

ITEM.name: Keepsake of a Noble Man
ITEM.desc: A platinum necklace with expensive jewels. Its elaborate carving enhances its value even more.
